metadata.description: Glass material items that drop as loot and reference glass properties.

items.name: Glass Shard
items.description: Simple glass fragment, sharp and fragile.

items.name: Stained Glass Fragment
items.description: Colorful glass piece from an artistic creation.

items.name: Obsidian Shard
items.description: Natural volcanic glass, razor-sharp and jet black.

items.name: Crystal Glass
items.description: Exceptionally clear and strong glass with crystalline structure.

items.name: Ethereal Glass
items.description: Translucent glass that seems to shift between material planes.
